# filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com

> Complete guide to filing bankruptcy without an attorney -- pro se Chapter 7 and Chapter 13, forms, fees, and preparation.

filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com is a free, open-source educational resource about filing bankruptcy pro se (without a lawyer). Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/: Overview of filing bankruptcy without a lawyer -- is it right for you?
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/chapter-7-pro-se.html: Filing Chapter 7 bankruptcy pro se -- step-by-step guide
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/chapter-13-pro-se.html: Filing Chapter 13 bankruptcy pro se -- challenges and considerations
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/forms-guide.html: Bankruptcy forms guide -- every form you need and how to complete them
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/filing-fees.html: Bankruptcy filing fees and fee waivers for pro se filers
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/credit-counseling.html: Credit counseling requirement -- what it is and how to complete it
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/meeting-prep.html: Preparing for the 341 meeting of creditors without an attorney
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/common-mistakes.html: Common pro se bankruptcy mistakes and how to avoid them
- https://filebankruptcywithoutlawyer.com/faq.html: Frequently asked questions about filing bankruptcy without a lawyer

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
